verses.text: A disciple admires the temple stones; 'there shall not be left one stone upon another.' Coming ruin. The proud temple will be utterly thrown down.
A disciple admires the temple stones; 'there shall not be left one stone upon another.' Coming ruin. The proud temple will be utterly thrown down.
They ask privately when these things shall be, and the sign. Anxious question. They long to read the times to come.
They ask privately when these things shall be, and the sign. Anxious question. They long to read the times to come.
'Take heed lest any man deceive you'; wars and earthquakes are 'the beginnings of sorrows.' First, beware. Such troubles are signs, not the end.
'Take heed lest any man deceive you'; wars and earthquakes are 'the beginnings of sorrows.' First, beware. Such troubles are signs, not the end.
'Take heed lest any man deceive you'; wars and earthquakes are 'the beginnings of sorrows.' First, beware. Such troubles are signs, not the end.
'Take heed lest any man deceive you'; wars and earthquakes are 'the beginnings of sorrows.' First, beware. Such troubles are signs, not the end.
Brought before rulers for His sake, take no thought what to speak; 'the Holy Ghost' shall speak in you. Promised help. God gives words to His witnesses in need.
Brought before rulers for His sake, take no thought what to speak; 'the Holy Ghost' shall speak in you. Promised help. God gives words to His witnesses in need.
Brought before rulers for His sake, take no thought what to speak; 'the Holy Ghost' shall speak in you. Promised help. God gives words to His witnesses in need.
Brother shall betray brother; 'he that shall endure unto the end... shall be saved.' Endurance. The crown is for those who hold on to the last.
Brother shall betray brother; 'he that shall endure unto the end... shall be saved.' Endurance. The crown is for those who hold on to the last.
When the abomination appears, let those in Judea flee without delay. Swift escape. Heed the warning and do not linger.
When the abomination appears, let those in Judea flee without delay. Swift escape. Heed the warning and do not linger.
When the abomination appears, let those in Judea flee without delay. Swift escape. Heed the warning and do not linger.
Woe to nursing mothers; except the days be shortened, none would be saved; for the elect's sake they are. Tempered trial. God limits the tribulation for His chosen.
Woe to nursing mothers; except the days be shortened, none would be saved; for the elect's sake they are. Tempered trial. God limits the tribulation for His chosen.
Woe to nursing mothers; except the days be shortened, none would be saved; for the elect's sake they are. Tempered trial. God limits the tribulation for His chosen.
Woe to nursing mothers; except the days be shortened, none would be saved; for the elect's sake they are. Tempered trial. God limits the tribulation for His chosen.
Believe not those who cry, Here is Christ; false christs shall show signs; 'take ye heed.' Beware deceit. The last days are full of subtle counterfeits.
Believe not those who cry, Here is Christ; false christs shall show signs; 'take ye heed.' Beware deceit. The last days are full of subtle counterfeits.
Believe not those who cry, Here is Christ; false christs shall show signs; 'take ye heed.' Beware deceit. The last days are full of subtle counterfeits.
After the tribulation the heavens shake; the Son of man comes and gathers His elect from the four winds. Glorious return. He comes openly to gather His own.
After the tribulation the heavens shake; the Son of man comes and gathers His elect from the four winds. Glorious return. He comes openly to gather His own.
After the tribulation the heavens shake; the Son of man comes and gathers His elect from the four winds. Glorious return. He comes openly to gather His own.
After the tribulation the heavens shake; the Son of man comes and gathers His elect from the four winds. Glorious return. He comes openly to gather His own.
Learn from the fig tree; when these appear, it is near; 'heaven and earth shall pass away: but my words shall not.' Sure word. All else perishes, but Christ's word stands.
Learn from the fig tree; when these appear, it is near; 'heaven and earth shall pass away: but my words shall not.' Sure word. All else perishes, but Christ's word stands.
Learn from the fig tree; when these appear, it is near; 'heaven and earth shall pass away: but my words shall not.' Sure word. All else perishes, but Christ's word stands.
Learn from the fig tree; when these appear, it is near; 'heaven and earth shall pass away: but my words shall not.' Sure word. All else perishes, but Christ's word stands.
Of that day knows none but the Father; 'watch and pray: for ye know not when the time is.' Stay ready. The hidden hour calls for constant watchfulness.
Of that day knows none but the Father; 'watch and pray: for ye know not when the time is.' Stay ready. The hidden hour calls for constant watchfulness.
Of that day knows none but the Father; 'watch and pray: for ye know not when the time is.' Stay ready. The hidden hour calls for constant watchfulness.
Watch, lest He come suddenly and find you sleeping; 'what I say unto you I say unto all, Watch.' For all. The call to watchfulness is to every believer.
